_comment: Code allowlist for tools/update.js. On upgrade, ONLY the paths/globs listed in `code` are overwritten with the new version's files. Anything NOT listed here is PRESERVED (default-preserve) — most importantly calendar-data.js, overlay-state.json, MEMORY.md, journal.md, brand-voice.md, offerings.md, content-roadmap.md, content-pipeline.md, content-log.md, content-playbook.md, .claude/settings.json, .compounds/, and .backups/. This keeps upgrades data-safe even if this manifest itself falls out of date.
